pixar.visual_style: Expressive rounded 3D feature animation style. Lighting: subsurface scattering, warm studio lighting, rim light. Render: high-quality 3D CGI with detailed soft surfaces.

camera_language.lighting_story: warm golden morning → cool interior → warm amber evening → dramatic sunset finale

pixar.description_language: 一切用 3D 动画语言表达。主体是 3D model / CGI asset / character model。材质用 SSS / glossy / claymation / stylized texture。环境用 geometry / volumetric fog / particle system。运动用 animated / smooth / dramatic / sweeping / exaggerated physical movements / stylized facial expressions。用 'clear distinct silhouette' 'warm studio light' 'rim light' 'expressive rounded 3D character animation' 等词汇。

lyrical-realism.visual_style: Live-action everyday life. Lighting: soft natural light, window diffused light, cinematic ambient. Camera: soft color negative film look, subtle film grain.

composition: shallow depth of field on detail
camera_language.lighting_story: dawn cool mist → afternoon warm haze → golden hour → dusk soft fade

lyrical-realism.description_language: 一切用实拍纪录片语言表达。主体是 real / natural / botanical / human。材质用 organic texture / film grain / natural surface。环境用 real landscape / atmosphere / haze / dust。运动用 breathing / gentle / slow / handheld。用 'warm natural light' 'window diffused light' 'true-to-life' 'candid' 等词汇。

pro-cinematic.visual_style: High-budget live-action cinematic production. Lighting: Balanced three-point lighting, naturalistic environmental fill, subtle edge separation. Camera: 35mm-50mm spherical prime lens, dynamic depth of field.

camera_language.lighting_story: neutral ambient base → directional key light → subtle edge separation → balanced environmental fill

pro-cinematic.description_language: 一切用标准电影实拍工业语言表达。主体用 real subject / physical object / practical environment。材质用 authentic texture / realistic physical materials / accurate light reflection。环境用 practical location / atmospheric depth / realistic set dressing。运动用 natural physical motion / realistic physics / smooth camera dynamics。用 'cinematic production' 'three-point lighting' 'true-to-life physics' 'sharp focus' 等纯物理描述词汇。

natgeo-documentary.visual_style: High-end wildlife and nature documentary photography. Lighting: natural light, directional sunlight. Camera: 35mm film grain, sharp focus.

camera_language.lighting_story: blue hour pre-dawn → golden sunrise → harsh noon sun → golden sunset → blue hour dusk

natgeo-documentary.description_language: 一切用高端自然纪录片摄影语言表达。主体用 real subject / wildlife / natural element。材质用 authentic texture / natural surface / dust and grain。环境用 vast landscape / atmosphere / weather。运动用 static / waiting / following。用 'high-speed capture' 'motion freeze' 'documentary natural light' 等词汇。

stop-motion.visual_style: Stop-motion animation photography, detailed miniature set. Lighting: Miniature practical lights, single directional hard light, dense shadow. Camera: 50mm macro lens, shallow depth of field, tactile details.

camera_language.lighting_story: harsh overhead practical → miniature desk lamp source → window slit shadow → colored gel rim

stop-motion.description_language: 一切用定格动画实拍语言表达。主体用 clay model / felt puppet / miniature figure / handcrafted object。材质用 tactile surface / visible fingerprints / fabric / physical material。环境用 miniature set / diorama / crafted props / cardboard texture。运动用 stuttering motion / incremental frame / static。用 'stop-motion' 'tactile texture' 'miniature scale' 'claymation' 等词汇。

traditional-2d-anime.visual_style: Traditional 2D cel animation. Lighting: Flat global illumination, soft painted shadows. Camera: Multiplane camera, sharp focus on all layers.

camera_language.lighting_story: bright flat daylight → golden hour painted shadows → deep blue night with glowing windows

traditional-2d-anime.description_language: 一切用传统二维动画语言表达。主体用 2D cel character / hand-drawn figure / flat shaded asset。材质用 watercolor background / crisp ink outlines / matte paint / cel shading。环境用 hand-painted landscape / illustrated sky / dense foliage。运动用 horizontal sliding / multiplane parallax / traditional 24fps frame。用 'traditional 2D animation' 'watercolor background' 'flat colors' 'anime-style' 等词汇。

product-hero-cinematic.visual_style: High-end television commercial (TVC) film. Lighting: Dynamic continuous studio lighting, sweeping highlights. Camera: High-speed cinema camera, macro cine lens.

camera_language.lighting_story: dark silhouette → sweeping spotlight reveal → dynamic rim light → bright commercial finish

product-hero-cinematic.description_language: 一切用高端商业广告片（TVC）语言表达。主体用 commercial product film / dynamic prop / high-end B-roll。材质用 premium glossy / hyper-detailed surface / dynamic liquid。环境用 moving light studio / infinite black void / abstract dynamic backdrop。运动用 high-speed motion control / extreme slow-motion / robotic sweep / dynamic transition。用 'commercial film' 'dynamic lighting' 'high-speed camera' 'macro motion' 等词汇。

action-handheld.visual_style: High-energy action commercial film. Lighting: High-contrast harsh sunlight, deep directional shadows, strong rim light. Camera: Handheld camera rig, wide-angle lens, extremely high shutter speed.

camera_language.lighting_story: harsh overhead sun → deep directional shadow → high-contrast silhouette → flashing practical light

action-handheld.description_language: 一切用高能动态广告语言表达。主体用 real human subject / physical actor / dynamic vehicle。材质用 flying dust / sweat droplets / gritty surface / reflective metal。环境用 high-contrast outdoor / atmospheric practical location / harsh lighting environment。运动用 explosive physical motion / rapid velocity / sharp physical impact / high-speed interaction。用 'high shutter speed' 'harsh rim light' 'handheld tracking' 'crash zoom' 等纯物理描述词汇。

streaming-prestige.visual_style: High-budget digital streaming drama. Lighting: large softbox diffused lighting, uniform ambient fill, subtle practical lights. Camera: large-format digital cinema sensor, 4K resolution, 35mm-50mm prime lens, clean optical capture.

camera_language.lighting_story: soft uniform daylight → balanced interior practicals → dim cool night ambient

streaming-prestige.description_language: 一切用现代高规格数字流媒体剧集语言表达。主体用 real actor / precise wardrobe / detailed skin tone。材质用 clean digital sensor texture / realistic physical materials / matte surface。环境用 practical modern location / controlled studio set / clean atmosphere。运动用 smooth precise motion / realistic human physics / steady camera movement。用 '4K digital cinema' 'soft diffused lighting' 'clean focus' 'large-format digital cinema look' 等词汇。

sunlit-lifestyle.visual_style: Modern bright lifestyle photography. Lighting: High-key lighting, large window diffused daylight, bright bounce fill. Camera: 50mm f/1.2 large aperture lens, extreme shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh.

camera_language.lighting_story: bright morning window light → harsh direct noon sun highlight → soft afternoon diffuse

sunlit-lifestyle.description_language: 一切用明亮生活方式商业摄影语言表达。主体用 real human / lifestyle object / natural botanical / casual wardrobe。材质用 soft fabric / natural skin / clean bright surface / organic texture。环境用 sunlit room / bright modern interior / clean minimal background。运动用 gentle human interaction / slow steady movement / soft breathing motion。用 'high-key lighting' 'window natural light' 'shallow depth of field' 'bright and airy' 等词汇。

hollywood-epic.visual_style: Large-scale blockbuster cinematic film. Lighting: high-contrast teal and orange bi-color lighting, harsh directional key light, strong blue rim light. Camera: anamorphic wide lens, horizontal lens flare, 24fps motion blur.

camera_language.lighting_story: high-contrast cool morning → harsh directional sunlight → golden hour flare → neon night practicals

hollywood-epic.description_language: 一切用大规模商业大片语言表达。主体用 lead actor / large scale physical prop / cinematic wardrobe。材质用 high-contrast texture / reflective metallic surface / atmospheric smoke / sharp physical details。环境用 large scale location / volumetric fog / deep physical set。运动用 dynamic fast motion / explosive physical movement / sweeping camera dynamics。用 'anamorphic lens' 'teal and orange grading' 'cinematic high contrast' 'horizontal flare' 等词汇。

selfie-vlog.visual_style: Modern creator POV vlog. Lighting: Direct ring light, harsh on-camera LED flash, or direct un-diffused natural light. Camera: 24mm wide-angle smartphone lens or mirrorless camera, deep depth of field, sharp edge-to-edge focus.

camera_language.lighting_story: uneven outdoor sun → mixed indoor fluorescent → direct face ring light

selfie-vlog.description_language: 一切用现代 Vlog 第一人称纪实语言表达。主体用 real human creator / casual everyday clothing / standard physical item。材质用 standard digital video texture / sharp everyday surface / unpolished physical material。环境用 authentic messy room / casual outdoor street / un-staged location。运动用 shaky handheld motion / fast walking physics / sudden camera turn。用 'smartphone camera style' 'POV vlog' 'wide angle lens' 'handheld shake' 等词汇。

micro-cosmos.visual_style: Stylized 3D animation microscopic world. Lighting: Subsurface scattering, warm studio key light, vibrant bioluminescent rim light. Render: High-quality octane render, glossy CGI.

camera_language.lighting_story: warm studio fill → bioluminescent pulse → vibrant magenta rim light → glowing cyan core

micro-cosmos.description_language: 一切用 3D 动画语言表达微观世界。主体用 3D cellular model / CGI microorganism / stylized particle / glossy organic shape。材质用 subsurface scattering / jelly-like silicone / translucent soft clay / vibrant emissive material。环境用 microscopic fluid / glowing volumetric fog / colorful dark void。运动用 bouncy stylized physics / exaggerated fluid dynamics / smooth liquid drifting。用 stylized 3D animation / subsurface scattering / vibrant bioluminescence / glossy render 等词汇。

pixel-art.visual_style: Retro 2D pixel art video game aesthetic. Resolution: Low-resolution pixel graphics. Palette: Limited 8-16 color palette. Lighting: Flat global lighting, hard-edged shadows. Render: 4-8 bit style, no anti-aliasing.

camera_language.lighting_story: bright tile daylight → warm lantern indoor → dark cavern with glow → flashing neon night

pixel-art.description_language: 一切用复古像素游戏语言表达。主体用 pixel art character / sprite object / 8-bit item / blocky shape。材质用 hard-edged pixel / solid ungradated color / dithered shadow / tile texture。环境用 tile map background / parallax layered sky / grid-based landscape / simple geometric shape。运动用 frame-by-frame / horizontal scrolling / step-by-step movement / sprite animation。用 'pixel art' '8-bit style' 'limited palette' 'retro game aesthetic' 'sprite animation' 'blocky resolution' 等词汇。
